author: Christopher Buckley
name: Compression-Funded MLP3x
blurb: Int6-style block-weight export plus fp16 embedding protection funds a 3x ReLU^2 MLP at the same 16MB artifact cap. Uses seq2048 long-context training and stride256 sliding-window eval.
notes: Best of 3 seeds on 8xH100 SXM (community cloud). Seed 1339: val_bpb=1.15982, Seed 1338: val_bpb=1.16143, Seed 1337: val_bpb=1.17283 (slower step_avg due to first-run CUDA compilation). Mean val_bpb=1.16469.
